query: I just pushed a CSS fix for the sidebar hover animation, take a quick screenshot of the clusters page to see if it looks right now
QA the dashboard — I want to make sure the cluster cards are showing real data and nothing is broken after the last deploy
can you verify the login page works? I changed the auth redirect logic and want to make sure the form still renders properly
check if the alerts page looks correct, there were some complaints about missing data in the table after we updated the tRPC router
I need to validate that the theme switch from dark to light doesn't break anything on the settings page — test both themes please
open the app in the browser and tell me if the events page is working — I see errors in the logs but the page might still render
before I merge this PR, take a look at the main pages and make sure nothing regressed — especially clusters and dashboard
does the karpenter page look right? I added a new autoscaling widget and want to confirm it shows up without console errors
I fixed the hydration error on PageTransition.tsx — can you navigate to the login page and check there are zero console errors now
write a new tRPC router for handling webhook events — it should have list, create, and delete mutations with Zod validation
the alert-evaluator background job is crashing with a TypeError when it tries to read undefined cluster health — debug this
add a new Playwright E2E test for the clusters page that verifies the table has at least one row after seeding
review the PR at https://github.com/viktor1298-dev/voyager-platform/pull/42 and give me feedback on the code quality
refactor the cluster-client-pool to use a Map instead of a plain object for the connection cache — the current approach doesn't handle WeakRef cleanup
deploy the app to minikube using the local deploy workflow and run the post-deploy health check
update the Helm chart values to increase the API replica count from 1 to 2 and add resource limits
I need help writing the visual regression test config — update playwright.visual.config.ts to add a tablet viewport project
read the DESIGN.md and tell me what the animation spring constants should be for card hover effects — I want to make sure I use the right values
run pnpm typecheck and pnpm build to make sure there are no compilation errors after my changes to the clusters router
check what the current database schema looks like — I need to see if the alerts table has a severity column or if we need to add one via migration
